scene.description: A vibrant, mouth-watering social media graphic announcing a food menu drop

background.type: dark surface (black marble or dark wood table) with dramatic overhead lighting
background.lighting: moody overhead spotlight, warm tones, food photography style
background.atmosphere: premium street food aesthetic, steam wisps

food_elements.arrangement: artfully scattered Mexican street food items viewed from above (flat lay)

items.type: smash burger with melted cheese and Mexican toppings on crispy fries
crispy golden taquitos standing upright in a cup with red sauce
loaded fries with ground beef and melted cheese dripping
bright orange mango drink with chili rim and lime
red spicy michelada drink with lime garnish

food_elements.style: hyper-appetizing, professional food photography, vibrant colors, slight steam

text_elements.style: massive bold white uppercase text with subtle drop shadow
text_elements.font_style: ultra bold condensed sans-serif like Bebas Neue

text_elements.text: 6 ITEMS YOU CAN'T GET ANYWHERE ELSE IN ATLANTA

text_elements.style: white text with green checkmark icon

branding.overall_style: premium street food meets luxury drop. Think Supreme product drop energy but for food.
